-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
**[** *theo valentino is as ruthless as they come when it comes to doing what needs to be done for the family business. as the son of the don of the valentino family -- one of the five mafia families which run new york city's underground -- he's loyal to a fault. so when his father tells him he'll be marrying his childhood friend, alessia moretti, he doesn't argue, despite the fact that alessia is like a sister to him and he'd rather take a bullet up the ass than marry her. however, when he spots the most breathtaking stranger he's ever laid eyes on at his cousin's café, he knows that he'll do anything to make them his.* **]**
